allow: Bash(Rscript -e 'suppressPackageStartupMessages\(library\(BioEstatR\)\); data\(osteo\); cat\("Package version:", as.character\(packageVersion\("BioEstatR"\)\), "\\n"\); cat\("osteo dim:", dim\(osteo\), "\\n"\); cat\("osteo columns:\\n"\); print\(colnames\(osteo\)\); cat\("\\nFirst 3 rows:\\n"\); print\(head\(osteo, 3\)\)')

Bash(Rscript -e 'suppressPackageStartupMessages\(library\(BioEstatR\)\); data\(osteo\); cat\("--- rlm smoke test ---\\n"\); rlm\(hba1c ~ tevol + edad + imc, data = osteo, grf = FALSE\); cat\("\\n--- rlogitm smoke test ---\\n"\); rlogitm\(osteo_cue ~ tabaco + edad + imc + tevol, data = osteo, grf = FALSE\)')

Bash(Rscript -e 'suppressPackageStartupMessages\(library\(BioEstatR\)\); cat\("--- Is grpsggp exported? ---\\n"\); cat\("grpsggp" %in% getNamespaceExports\("BioEstatR"\), "\\n"\); cat\("\\n--- icl example ---\\n"\); icl\(x = 12, n = 1000\); cat\("\\n--- nl example ---\\n"\); nl\(x = 3, d = 1\)')
